sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: POWER SOLUTIONS INTERNATIONAL, INC. (PSIX) DEADLINE ALERT
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP reminds investors of Power Solutions International, Inc. (NASDAQ: PSIX) about an upcoming deadline for a securities fraud class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased shares between May 8, 2025, and March 2, 2026, and incurred losses, are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their legal rights and options, with the lead plaintiff deadline set for May 19, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that the company made misrepresentations regarding its ability to meet sales demand for power systems solutions, particularly in the data center market.

feed.title: Rep. Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. Purchases Shares of RBC Bearings Incorporated (NYSE:RBC)
feed.summary: Representative Gilbert Ray Cisneros, Jr. recently purchased between $1,001 and $15,000 worth of RBC Bearings Incorporated (NYSE:RBC) shares on March 3rd, disclosed on April 7th. This trade occurred within his "150 MAIN STREET TRUST > BANK OF AMERICA" account. Cisneros also engaged in several other stock transactions in late March, including purchases in StandardAero, FirstService, LPL Financial, and DoorDash, and sales in MACOM Technology Solutions, Charles Schwab, Advanced Energy Industries, Flex, and Viavi Solutions, along with a larger purchase in Fabrinet.

feed.title: RPM International (NYSE:RPM) Given New $121.00 Price Target at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has raised its price target for RPM International (NYSE:RPM) to $121.00 from $118.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating and suggesting a 7.27% upside. This adjustment comes after RPM beat Q3 earnings expectations with $0.57 EPS and $1.61 billion in revenue, driving a recent share rally. The company currently has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with a $125.75 average price target.

feed.title: Richardson Electronics (RELL) Earnings Call
feed.summary: Richardson Electronics (NASDAQ:RELL) reported its third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, showing its seventh consecutive quarter of year-over-year sales growth, driven primarily by strong performance in its Power and Microwave Technologies (PMT) segment. The company highlighted significant backlog growth, strategic investments in green energy solutions (GES), and the completion of a major inventory build for a critical supplier, positioning it for continued revenue growth and improved profitability. Management also addressed initiatives for recurring revenue and potential opportunities in advanced semiconductor technologies and wind turbine markets.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum Just Discovered Oil in an Exploratory Well Off the Gulf of America. Here Are 2 More Stocks That Could Soar as a Result.
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) has announced a significant oil discovery in the Bandit site off the Louisiana coast, within the area now referred to as the Gulf of America. This exploratory well, potentially one of the deepest, contains high-quality oil-bearing Miocene sands. Beyond Occidental, Chevron (CVX) and Woodside Energy Group (WDS) are also stakeholders in the Bandit project, and all three companies stand to benefit from this discovery, especially given its potential to yield 230 million barrels of oil equivalent.

feed.title: SYF: JP Morgan Lowers Price Target, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: JP Morgan analyst Richard Shane has lowered the price target for Synchrony Financial (SYF) from $84.00 to $73.00, while maintaining a 'Neutral' rating. This adjustment reflects a 13.10% decrease in the price target and follows similar actions by other analysts who have also reduced their price targets for SYF, though some have kept or upgraded their ratings. Synchrony Financial operates as the largest provider of private-label credit cards in the U.S. and continues to receive varied assessments from financial analysts.

feed.title: Solaris Resources (NYSE: SLSR) secures EIA approval and US$50M Royal Gold tranche
feed.summary: Solaris Resources has received technical approval for the Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) for its Warintza copper project in Ecuador, a significant de-risking milestone after a multi-year government review. This approval unlocks a US$50 million second tranche of funding from its existing US$200 million agreement with Royal Gold, strengthening Solaris' balance sheet. The company is targeting a fully permitted project by the end of 2026.

feed.title: General Dynamics will webcast first-quarter results on April 29
feed.summary: General Dynamics (NYSE: GD) announced it will webcast its 2026 first-quarter financial results conference call on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. EDT. The live webcast and a replay will be accessible via the company's website, www.gd.com. Historically, similar webcast announcements have had minimal impact on stock price, with investors typically focusing more on the actual earnings release.

feed.title: American Water Awards 2026 Scholarship to Emily Bores
feed.summary: American Water has awarded its 2026 scholarship, valued at $5,000, to Emily Bores, a Ph.D. student at the University of South Carolina. Her research focuses on improving harmful algal bloom monitoring programs in South Carolina. This scholarship highlights American Water's commitment to fostering the next generation of water professionals and driving innovation in the water industry.

feed.title: Southern Co. Stock Could Join Dividend Aristocrats. Why It May Return 10%.
feed.summary: Southern Co. is set to become a new member of the Dividend Aristocrats index, offering investors steady dividend payouts amid market uncertainty. The company's consistent earnings growth and a 3% yield are expected to contribute to a potential 10% return this year. This makes it an attractive option for those seeking dependable income.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics (TPL) logs small Texas Pacific Land insider share purchase
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a more-than-10% owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL), reported an open-market purchase of 1 common share for $447.12 on April 7, 2026, increasing its direct holdings to 3,435,489 shares. The filing also noted a reduction of 25,808 shares from beneficial ownership due to the unexpected passing of director Mr. Stahl, as these shares are no longer subject to Section 16 reporting. Although a small transaction, the filing provides transparency into institutional ownership and reporting adjustments.

feed.title: University of South Carolina Ph.D. student wins $5,000 water scholarship
feed.summary: American Water (NYSE: AWK) has awarded its 2026 American Water Works Association (AWWA) scholarship to Emily Bores, a Ph.D. student at the University of South Carolina. The $5,000 annual scholarship supports graduate-level water research, with Bores being recognized for her work on cyanobacteria identification and quantitative PCR monitoring of toxin-producing genes to improve harmful algal bloom detection. The award highlights American Water's commitment to investing in future water professionals and advancing innovation in water quality and research.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil expects production drop and billions of dollars of negative impacts from Iran war
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil expects a significant impact on its first-quarter production due to the ongoing war with Iran, estimating a 6% drop. The company also anticipates billions of dollars in negative financial impacts resulting from timing effects as oil prices experience an increase because of the conflict.

feed.title: PinkPantheress fronts UGG campaign as Coachella debut nears
feed.summary: UGG (a division of Deckers Brands) has announced British singer, songwriter, and producer PinkPantheress as the face of its new social-first campaign, ahead of her Coachella debut. The campaign highlights PinkPantheress embodying the brand's feeling of "softness meets confidence and comfort becomes expression," featuring her in various UGG styles like the Tazz, Quill Ballet Sneaker, and GoldenGlow Embossed. The collaboration aims to showcase the shared cultural impact and high-fashion sensibility between the artist and the UGG brand.

feed.title: Corning Stock Is Tracking a New Record. It’s Because of AI.
feed.summary: Corning Inc. stock is approaching a new record high, driven by the increasing demand for optical networking technologies fueled by artificial intelligence. The 175-year-old glass manufacturer is positioned to significantly benefit from this AI-driven market trend.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) Price Target Cut to $23.00 by Analysts at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley cut its price target for Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH) from $24.00 to $23.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, which suggests a 13.81% upside from the current price. This follows NCLH reporting Q1 EPS of $0.28, beating estimates, but missing revenue consensus and issuing lower Q1 and FY 2026 EPS guidance. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, but faces challenges with high leverage and low liquidity.

feed.title: QVC Group Teetering on the Brink of Survival
feed.summary: The QVC Group, comprising brands like QVC, HSN, and Ballard Designs, is facing significant financial distress, as evidenced by its delayed annual report filing and downgrades from ratings firms such as Fitch and Moody's. The company has acknowledged "substantial doubt" about its ability to continue as a going concern, following quarters of declining revenues, consolidations, and layoffs. Despite a history of innovation in home shopping, QVC Group struggles to compete with modern retail formats and attract new generations of shoppers.

feed.title: TE Connectivity (TEL) exec exercises options, sells 9,400 shares under plan
feed.summary: TE Connectivity executive Shadrak W. Kroeger exercised stock options for 9,400 Common Shares at $93.63 each and subsequently sold all 9,400 shares in open-market transactions on April 8, 2026. The sales, executed at weighted average prices of $223.72 and $222.85 per share, were conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in November 2025. After these transactions, Kroeger directly holds 25,976 Common Shares.

feed.title: ResMed (NYSE:RMD) CEO Michael Farrell Sells 4,991 Shares
feed.summary: ResMed (NYSE:RMD) CEO Michael Farrell sold 4,991 shares of the company's stock on April 7th for over $1.1 million, reducing his direct stake by 1.06%. This transaction was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with $2.81 EPS and revenue up 11% year-over-year.

feed.title: YieldMax GOOGL option income strategy ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.0854
feed.summary: The YieldMax GOOGL Option Income Strategy ETF (GOOY) has announced a weekly distribution of $0.0854 per share for its shareholders. The record date for this distribution is April 11, 2024, with payment to be made on April 12, 2024. This announcement provides key financial details regarding the ETF's regular shareholder returns.

feed.title: Inside downstream correspondent banking – and why it matters
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank's Matthew Probershteyn discusses the evolving perception of risk in downstream correspondent banking. He explains how regulatory changes and industry initiatives, such as the Wolfsberg Group's DDQ and ISO 20022 adoption, are strengthening control frameworks and transparency. The article highlights how multiple layers of oversight and collaboration are transforming downstream banking into "access banking" for a more resilient and inclusive global financial system.

feed.title: Raymond James lifts Instacart to Outperform on agentic shopping opportunity
feed.summary: Raymond James upgraded Instacart to Outperform with a $50 price target, citing the formal launch of its Cart Assistant tool as a significant catalyst. Analyst Josh Beck believes agentic shopping experiences will boost conversion rates and order values in the under-penetrated online grocery market. Despite competitive threats from Amazon, Instacart's faster fulfillment times and potential for new users via third-party AI platforms position it for growth.

feed.title: A Look At Camden Property Trust (CPT) Valuation After Recent Leadership Changes
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust (CPT) has undergone a significant leadership change, promoting three key executives. The company's stock shows mixed performance, with recent gains contrasting with weaker longer-term returns, and current valuations suggest it might be undervalued according to one narrative, while another points to valuation risk due to a high P/E ratio. Investors are urged to consider these various insights and potential risks before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Eaton (ETN) to Invest Over $30 Million in New Nebraska Facility
feed.summary: Eaton (ETN) is investing over $30 million to build a new 370,000-square-foot facility in Bellevue, Nebraska, to meet the rising demand for electrical equipment, particularly medium-voltage switchgear. This expansion aims to boost U.S. manufacturing capacity and will create over 200 jobs, with production expected to begin in early 2027. The move comes as the U.S. switchgear market is projected to grow significantly, highlighting Eaton's strategic focus on its electrical segment.

feed.title: QURE FINAL DEADLINE: ROSEN, A LEADING LAW FIRM, Encourages uniQure N.V. Investors with Losses ...
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is reminding investors who purchased uniQure N.V. ordinary shares between September 24, 2025, and October 31, 2025, that the lead plaintiff deadline for a class action lawsuit is April 13, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that uniQure misrepresented information regarding their Pivotal Study for Huntington's Disease and the likelihood of FDA approval, causing investors to suffer damages. Investors are encouraged to contact the Rosen Law Firm to learn more about joining the class action.

feed.title: 4 Health Care Stocks Whale Activity In Today's Session
feed.summary: This article analyzes unusual options trading activity in four healthcare stocks: UnitedHealth Group (UNH), Pfizer (PFE), Humana (HUM), and Novo Nordisk (NVO). It details specific call and put option trades, including expiration dates, strike prices, total trade value, open interest, and volume, to highlight potential "whale" activity for traders. The analysis aims to help identify significant trading opportunities based on these large-scale options transactions.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Expands Global Biobank Leadership
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has announced a strategic collaboration with Precision Health Research, Singapore (PRECISE) to advance the PRECISE-SG100K project. This initiative aims to perform population-scale proteomics research by analyzing protein profiles from 100,000 Singaporean individuals, utilizing Thermo Fisher's advanced mass spectrometry technology. The goal is to gain deeper insights into diseases and health, potentially leading to new biomarkers and therapeutic targets.

feed.title: Is ConocoPhillips Positioned to Benefit From Elevated Oil Prices?
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) is well-positioned to benefit from elevated oil prices due to its recent integration of Marathon Oil, which adds high-quality, low-cost resources to its asset base, particularly in the U.S. Lower 48 with a breakeven cost of $40 per barrel of WTI. The company's strategy includes reducing capital expenditures by nearly $1 billion to improve free cash flow and shareholder returns. Despite its strong operational outlook, COP currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), similar to Exxon Mobil (XOM) and EOG Resources (EOG), which are also highlighted for their competitive edge with high-quality inventories and low production costs.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land board member Murray Stahl dies
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation announced the death of board member Murray Stahl, who was also CEO, Chairman, and Chief Investment Strategist of Horizon Kinetics Holding Corporation, TPL's largest shareholder. TPL's CEO and Chairman expressed gratitude for Stahl's significant contributions to the company, highlighting his belief in TPL's potential. Texas Pacific Land, which owns vast acreage in Texas, generates revenue from land use, oil and gas royalties, and other services, and has shown strong financial performance and recent positive analyst re-ratings despite a slight earnings miss.

feed.title: Power, not chips, may decide Korea’s AI future
feed.summary: Rep. Lee Hae-min warns that South Korea's ambition to become a global AI powerhouse is jeopardized by a critical lack of electricity and stalled reforms. She emphasizes that expanding power purchase agreements (PPAs) and redesigning tech regulation are crucial for securing stable energy for AI and fostering innovation. Lee also advocates for a societal rethink to manage the economic impact of AI, proposing solutions like reduced working hours and an AI transition fund.

feed.title: Dow's 312-point rally highlighted by gains in shares of Amazon.com Inc., Caterpillar
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rallied by 312 points, with significant gains seen in stocks like Amazon.com Inc. and Caterpillar. This performance contributed to the overall positive movement of the index. The article does not contain further details.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: PriceSmart Q2 2026 beats earnings estimates
feed.summary: PriceSmart Inc. (PSMT) announced strong Q2 FY2026 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with an EPS of $1.62 and revenue of $1.5 billion. The company saw a 3.12% stock increase, driven by robust net merchandise sales growth, improved gross margins, and significant digital sales. PriceSmart plans further expansion in its warehouse club network and continued investment in digital and omnichannel capabilities, while also addressing potential risks from currency fluctuations and supply chain disruptions.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Appoints Brian Harrell as Chief Security Officer Amid Rising Grid Threats
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. has appointed Brian Harrell as Vice President and Chief Security Officer to lead enterprise-wide security, including cybersecurity and physical security. This hire comes as U.S. energy infrastructure faces escalating cyber risks and increased regulatory scrutiny. Harrell, with previous experience at Avangrid Energy and the U.S. Department of Homeland Security, will focus on integrating digital and physical defenses for the utility.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum Corp Stock (MPC) Moved Down by 3.47% on Apr 9: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum Corp (MPC) stock declined by 3.47% on April 9th, primarily due to volatile crude oil prices driven by uncertain geopolitical developments, specifically concerns over a US-Iran ceasefire and potential disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz. Despite some positive analyst upgrades, the broader market sentiment, combined with discussions of an EU windfall tax on energy firms and potential Q1 2026 earnings misses for MPC, pressured the stock. Technical indicators show mixed signals, while fundamental analysis highlights the company's strong revenue but also specific operational risks including refinery outages and maintenance.

feed.title: Picard Medical, Inc. (NYSE: PMI) Investor Alert: Deadline in Lawsuit on April 13, 2026
feed.summary: A lawsuit has been filed against Picard Medical, Inc. (NYSE: PMI) alleging federal securities law violations related to a stock promotion scheme and misleading statements. Investors who purchased shares between September 2, 2025, and October 31, 2025, face a deadline of April 13, 2026, to contact the Shareholders Foundation, Inc. for options. The company's financials for 2024 showed a decline in revenue and an increased net loss compared to 2023.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land Board Member and Horizon Kinetics CEO Murray Stahl Dies
feed.summary: Murray Stahl, a board member of Texas Pacific Land Corporation and CEO of Horizon Kinetics Holding Corporation, has passed away. Stahl was a long-time investor and crucial advocate for Texas Pacific Land, playing a significant role in its transformation into a major energy-related company in the Permian Basin. His vision helped the company capitalize on its land and royalty model amidst increasing energy infrastructure demand.

feed.title: RCI Hospitality (Nasdaq: RICK) 2Q26 sales rise as Bombshells lags
feed.summary: RCI Hospitality Holdings, Inc. reported modest sales growth for Q2 fiscal year 2026, with combined club and sports bar-restaurant sales reaching $68.2 million, a 4.3% increase year-over-year. While nightclub sales grew by 4.7%, same-store sales for nightclubs dipped 0.7%, and Bombshells restaurants experienced an 11.1% decline in same-store sales despite a 1.6% increase in total sales. The company is strategically repositioning its Bombshells concept to focus on higher-margin alcohol sales, following a successful test at a Houston location.

feed.title: Eaton Corporation PLC Stock (ETN) Moved Up by 3.13% on Apr 9: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Eaton Corporation PLC (ETN) saw its stock price rise by 3.13% due to strategic investments in U.S. switchgear production to meet data center demand and increased confidence from institutional investors. The company announced a significant $30 million investment for a new Nebraska facility to boost switchgear output by 2027, catering to the growing needs of AI-driven data centers. This positive movement is also supported by strong financial performance in Q4 2025 and strategic partnerships in the data center sector, despite some concerns regarding earnings guidance and insider sales.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Inc Stock (PANW) Moved Down by 5.37% on Apr 9: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks Inc (PANW) stock fell by 5.37% on April 9th, driven by cautious financial guidance, high acquisition costs related to the $25 billion CyberArk deal, and subsequent analyst downgrades. The company's reduced EPS outlook for fiscal year 2026, combined with concerns over AI's impact on the cybersecurity market and a high valuation, contributed to its underperformance compared to the Software & IT Services sector. Technical analysis indicates neutral signals, while fundamental analysis highlights its elevated Price-to-Earnings ratio and recent insider sales.

feed.title: Chevron, Partners Find Oil In Gulf Deepwater Bandit Well
feed.summary: Chevron announced an oil discovery at the Bandit prospect in the deepwater Gulf of Mexico, highlighting its exploration strategy and the region's importance for domestic oil supply. The find comes as Chevron's stock shows some intermediate-term strength despite broader market declines, with analysts maintaining a "Buy" rating. The company, along with partners Occidental Petroleum and Woodside Energy, will deliver its next financial update on May 1, 2026.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: Power Solutions International, Inc. (PSIX)
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP is alerting investors of Power Solutions International, Inc. (PSIX) about an upcoming May 19, 2026 deadline to file as lead plaintiff in a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Power Solutions made misleading statements regarding its ability to meet demand and the impact of manufacturing enhancements, leading to significant stock price drops following disappointing financial results and outlooks. Investors who suffered losses on PSIX securities between May 8, 2025, and March 2, 2026, are urged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Intuit Inc Stock (INTU) Moved Down by 6.89% on Apr 9: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Intuit Inc (INTU) stock dropped by 6.89% on April 9th, primarily due to increased competition from the IRS's expanded Direct File tax system, which threatens Intuit's market share. The decline was also influenced by the stock's ex-dividend date, causing a natural price adjustment, and prior analyst downgrades from major firms. Technical indicators further suggest sustained negative momentum and selling pressure on the stock.

feed.title: TPL loses board member as largest shareholder’s CEO Murray Stahl dies
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (TPL) announced the passing of board member Murray Stahl, who was also the CEO and Chief Investment Strategist of Horizon Kinetics Holding Corporation, TPL's largest shareholder. Stahl was recognized as a visionary who significantly advocated for TPL's transformation into one of the largest publicly-traded energy companies. The company expressed its condolences to his family and acknowledged his substantial contributions to TPL.

feed.title: TPL Announces the Passing of Murray Stahl
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (TPL) announced the passing of Murray Stahl, a board member and CEO of Horizon Kinetics Holding Corporation, TPL’s largest shareholder. TPL's CEO, Ty Glover, and Chairman, Rhys Best, expressed their condolences and gratitude for Stahl's significant contributions and vision, highlighting his belief in the company's potential. TPL is a major landowner in Texas, primarily in the Permian Basin, generating revenue from its surface and royalty ownership.

feed.title: D-Wave Quantum's Deep Pockets Fuel a Costly Technological Gamble
feed.summary: D-Wave Quantum is prioritizing aggressive technological investment over short-term profits, despite widening losses and a lagging stock price, backed by $884.5 million in cash. The company's strategy involves expanding its research teams and investing in infrastructure, funded by massive liquidity and recent significant orders, though its stock performance has been poor compared to broader markets. Analysts maintain a "cautiously constructive" outlook, citing D-Wave's dual-platform approach as a potential competitive edge, but also highlighting significant risks like high valuation and share dilution.

feed.title: Down 50%, Is PYPY a Lost Cause or a Hidden Opportunity?
feed.summary: The article analyzes the YieldMax PYPL Option Income Strategy ETF (PYPY), which offers a substantial 72% yield through weekly distributions despite PayPal's stock collapse. While PYPY's synthetic covered call strategy provides income, it caps gains during PayPal's recovery and absorbs full declines, with nearly all distributions being a return of capital rather than income. The author concludes that PYPY is a lost cause for investors seeking principal recovery, suitable only for those who believe PayPal has bottomed and are content with limited upside for weekly payments.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering Uncapped Buffered Return Enhanced Notes linked to the S&P 500® Futures Excess Return Index, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are designed for investors seeking an uncapped return of at least 1.70 times any appreciation of the index at maturity, with a potential loss of up to 80% of principal. The notes are unsecured obligations and subject to the credit risks of both JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines (DAL) Target Price Raised by Citigroup to $79
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its target price for Delta Air Lines (DAL) to $79 from $77, while maintaining a 'Buy' rating. This adjustment reflects continued analyst confidence in the airline, although other recent analyst updates show varied target price changes. The average target price from 23 analysts is $78.24, implying a 14.26% upside from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $50.78, suggesting a potential downside.

feed.title: Delta Earnings: Premium Travel Demand Saves Firm
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines experienced a 12% decrease in operating profit despite a 13% increase in revenue and 1% more capacity in the first quarter of 2026. This was significantly impacted by increased salaries and fuel expenses. However, strong demand for premium cabin sales, which rose 14%, helped to offset flat economy seating revenue, highlighting Delta's successful strategy of segmenting its travel offerings.

feed.title: State Street Corporation Expands Servicing Support for Thornburg Investment Management
feed.summary: State Street Corporation has expanded its nearly 40-year relationship with Thornburg Investment Management Inc., providing end-to-end servicing support for Thornburg’s new ETF share classes. This expansion will allow Thornburg to broaden access to its active investment strategies, with State Street delivering comprehensive ETF servicing including custody, accounting, and order management. The move builds on a partnership that began in 1987 and further integrates State Street's full-service support across Thornburg's diverse product lineup.
